transliterations.transliteration: taai3 gik6 taai3 saan1 daam3/sek6 gam2 dong1/dong3
tài jí tài shān shí gǎn dāng
iânn tsik tû tsiann kiù Bān bîn
jing4 zaak3 ceoi4/cyu4 zeng1/zing1 gau3 maan6 man4
yíng zé chú jīng jiù wàn mín

trans.div: It is the responsibility of the camp to eliminate the essence and save the people.

names.name: Dongwei Village Shigandang Next To Tianhou Gong

transliterations.transliteration: taai3 saan1 daam3/sek6 gam2 dong1/dong3 zi2 saat3
tài shān shí gǎn dāng zhǐ shā

trans.div: Taishan stone dares to be used as evil spirit
